
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>

<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Evidence: From the updated perception, the object tagged as Tape\_4 is blue and circular in shape. Hypothesis: Tape\_4 is the blue circular object the user wants me to pick. Verification step: The visual evidence clearly shows Tape\_4 as blue and circular, so no further verification is needed. Decision and Next action: I will pick the object tagged as Tape\_4. I will now call the PickObject tool with ObjTag "Tape\_4".

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Tape_4"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Token usage:** prompt=9071, completion=119, total=9190
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Object Tape\_4 was not initially reachable; you moved to \(x=\-0.68, y=0.08, z=\-0.62\) and picked it successfully.

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked the blue circular object, which is the tape labeled as Tape\_4. Let me know if you need anything else.
